positive: A retro-futuristic advertisement poster for 'A Trip to Mars' in the style of 1950s Art Deco illustration. Features stylized rockets, atomic motifs, and smiling stick figures. Limited color palette (mustard yellow, teal, crimson). Distressed screen-print texture, vintage advertisement feel.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern, digital, photorealism, cartoon
